changelog: Fixed the setup wizard/settings 'popup' rendering as a small transparent overlay bleeding through the editor instead of a proper full-screen modal: it now renders as an opaque, centered, internally-scrollable card (~94vw on small screens) above a dimmed/blurred backdrop, at a guaranteed top z-index. Fixed a duplicate 'API Key' label, replaced the Show/Hide text button with a properly-sized eye-icon toggle, fixed checkbox alignment and touch-target size, made the Continue/Save button a full-width primary action with Skip/secondary actions below, added responsive stacking on narrow screens, and preloaded all stylesheets at plugin init to avoid an unstyled flash on first open.
